_note: Shared StrategyConfig knob overrides for the A/B ablation harness. Deliberately EXCLUDES `guard_enabled` — that is the ONE knob the harness flips between arm A (baseline) and arm B (guarded). Every field here is applied IDENTICALLY to both arms, so the only config difference is the guard block (REQ-110). Values are non-default (default residual_band=0.02, fee_bps=100.0) so the config identity is non-trivial and the hash-level arm-identity check is meaningful.
